todayPlan.selectedRoute: PM-direct 闭环 4 commit + push + compile + smoke + cleanup (无 long-worker dispatch)

blocker: 外部 connector 仍 disabled；live-subagents 仍受 403 DAILY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED 阻塞直到复查；control-cockpit 中央 4x2 网格和受保护卖点文件保持锁定；透明 Electron 窗口自动截图仍报 SetIsBorderRequired failed；Git post-push log/staging/commit/push 仍需明确确认。

connectors.label: Codex
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM accepts controlled dry-run plan; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass; orchestration:check + lint/build when code changes
connectors.readinessEvidence: Get-Command resolves codex on PATH; discovery only.
connectors.missingReadiness: Controlled dry-run design, non-interactive JSON/auth-quota/timeout/no-UI evidence, and PM acceptance.
connectors.nextAction: Keep codex draft-only until the missing evidence exists and PM/user explicitly revises the machine gate.

connectors.label: Trae
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM confirms executable path and non-interactive args; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.readinessEvidence: No trae executable resolves via Get-Command; command stays empty.
connectors.missingReadiness: Exact executable path, exact non-interactive args, safety evidence, and PM acceptance decision.
connectors.nextAction: Keep trae as placeholder until PM/user supplies the exact invocation and readiness evidence.

connectors.label: Qoder
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM confirms executable path and verification surface; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.readinessEvidence: No qoder executable resolves via Get-Command; command stays empty.
connectors.missingReadiness: Exact executable path, exact verification surface, safety evidence, and PM acceptance decision.
connectors.nextAction: Keep qoder as placeholder until PM/user supplies the exact invocation and readiness evidence.
